contentBlocks.original:
नारायणं हृषीकेशं गोविंदं गरुडध्वजं ।
वासुदेवं हरिं कृष्णं केशवं प्रणमाम्यहं ।।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
nārāyaṇaṃ hṛṣīkeśaṃ goviṃdaṃ garuḍadhvajaṃ .
vāsudevaṃ hariṃ kṛṣṇaṃ keśavaṃ praṇamāmyahaṃ ..
contentBlocks.translation: I salute Narayana, Hrishikesa, Govinda, Garudadhwaja, Vaasudeva, Hari, Krishna and Kesava.
contentBlocks.meanings: नारायणं (nārāyaṇam) – Narayana; हृषीकेशं (hṛṣīkeśam) – Hrishikesa; गोविंदं (goviṃdam) – Govinda; गरुडध्वजं (garuḍadhvajam) – Garudadhwaja (garuḍa:Garuda | dhvaja:flag); वासुदेवं (vāsudevam) – Vaasudeva; हरिं (hariṃ) – Hari; कृष्णं (kṛṣṇam) – Krishna; केशवं (keśavam) – Kesava; प्रणमामि (praṇamāmi) – I salute; अहं (ahaṃ) – I;
